---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for LifeOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: bug, enhancement
assignees: seldonrios

---

## ✨ Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature or idea.

---

## 🎯 Problem / Use Case
What problem does this solve?

Describe the real-world scenario or workflow:
- What are you trying to accomplish?
- Why is this important?
- Who does this benefit?

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe your ideal solution:

- What should happen?
- How should it behave?
- What would the user experience look like?

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

---

## 🧠 LifeOS Context

### 🧩 Affected Area(s)
Check all that apply:

- [ ] Core system
- [ ] AI / reasoning engine
- [ ] Memory system
- [ ] Automation / workflows
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] Developer experience
- [ ] Other: _______

---

### 🔌 Module or Integration (if applicable)
Is this a new module or related to an existing one?

---

### ⚙️ Implementation Thoughts (Optional)
If you have technical ideas, share them:

- Architecture ideas
- APIs involved
- Data flow or logic

---

## 📈 Impact & Value

What kind of impact would this have?

- [ ] 🔴 High (core capability / major improvement)
- [ ] 🟠 Medium (useful enhancement)
- [ ] 🟡 Low (nice-to-have)

Who benefits?
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Both

---

## 🧪 Example / Mockup (Optional)
Add screenshots, diagrams, or examples if helpful.

---

## 🔗 Related Issues / Discussions
Link anything related here.

---

## 🧩 Additional Context
Anything else we should know?

---

## 🚀 Contribution
Are you interested in contributing to this?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe (with guidance)
- [ ] No
